scripts.clean: node --eval "import('node:fs/promises').then(async fs => { for (const dir of ['packages/core/dist','packages/renderer-skia/dist','packages/renderer-svg/dist','packages/renderer-web/dist','packages/shared/dist','packages/examples/dist','packages/plugins/dist','packages/docs/dist','coverage']) { await fs.rm(dir, { recursive: true, force: true }); } })"
